name: BigCommerce
description: BigCommerce — Headless e-commerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs for catalog, cart, and checkout customization.

seo.title: BigCommerce — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: BigCommerce: BigCommerce — Headless e-commerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs for catalog, cart, and checkout customization.

when_to_use: Headless e-commerce backend for custom-built storefronts
Multi-channel selling: web, mobile, and marketplace from one API
Composable commerce with catalog, cart, checkout REST/GraphQL APIs
B2B pricing and account management for wholesale commerce
Scaling enterprise retail without managing commerce infrastructure

cons: Admin UI feels dated in places
review.verdict: A credible headless commerce engine for mid-market, but Shopify still wins on ecosystem.
review.best_for: Mid-market B2C and B2B brands going headless with GMV under thresholds
review.not_for: SMBs who want the biggest app marketplace and fastest onboarding

lock_in.reason: Data exportable via API but store tied to platform
